source: fresh local Korean ASR translate pass grouped into phrase-level captions

entries.text: Hello. I'm Kim Jeong Ah, a nurse practitioner at Eminent Hospice.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: Today, I will explain about POLST.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: POLST is an official document that determines what treatment to receive when the patient
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: with severe disease has a serious disease with the weakness of life-sustaining treatment.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: It is an official document. In other words, you can think of it as
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: a medical order for treatment of life-sustaining treatment, whether to receive it or not.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: If the patient can write it himself, you can write it instead of a
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: legal person such as a family or a power of attorney.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: POLST's writing is not a question, but if you do not write it in
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: advance, you will feel great pressure or guilt because you have to decide on your family later.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: Also, if you do not have a advance decision, you may be able to
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: accept the patient's pain due to unnecessary medical procedures.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: Accordingly, it is most desirable that the patient decides in advance.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: The written content can be changed at any time.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: POLST is usually written in a bright pink form so that it can be
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: seen well in the eyes, and it is often called the pink form.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: If you keep it at home, it is often attached to the refrigerator or
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: place where it can be seen well compared to emergency situations.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: When 911 is launched, POLST determines the direction of treatment depending on the content,
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: such as CPR, intubation, and so on.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: If there is no POLST, it is automatically controlled by full code and all life-sustaining treatment.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: All emergency measures are carried out to prevent the patient from suffering.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: POLST is largely composed of Part-A, B, C, D, and D, and each patient
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: has their own treatment standards and circumstances.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: At the top right, you can enter the patient's information on patient information.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: Part-A is a part that decides whether to perform CPR or not when the
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: patient's heart stops or does not breathe.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: The first option is an attempt to perform CPR, intubation, and CPR.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: If you check the CPR, it means that all possible emergency measures are taken
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: when the patient's heart stops.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: At the site, the heart massage and CPR are carried out, and all treatments
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: include all treatments for life extension, such as transplantation, electric shock, medical treatment, prayer, and CPR.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: In other words, all medical treatments provided by the modern medicine for the patient
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: are meant to receive full treatment.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: The second option is an attempt to perform CPR, intubation, and CPR.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: There are a lot of cases where the doctor checks the patient at the door,
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: and if the doctor preserves the medicine at the hospice, the patient doesn't have
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: to go to the hospital yet.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: For example, some patients are too often to go to the hospital because the
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: patient is too sick to go to the hospital.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: patient is too sick to go to the hospital.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: For example, some patients are too often to go to the hospital because the
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: patient is too sick to go to the hospital because the patient is too
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: sick to go to the hospital because the patient is too sick to go to the hospital.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: And after the hospice started, there were a lot of side effects.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: At that time, the hospice doctor had to go to the hospital for a year
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: because he had to go to the hospital for a year.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: So the patient's condition got better, so there were times when the hospice treatment ended.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: In this case, there are often cases like this.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: The purpose of hospice is not to pull the patient in front of him
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: or let him go.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: Hospice is a place where the patient is present, so it helps to get
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: the last dose naturally.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: So even if the emergency situation comes, rather than going through a difficult treatment
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: process at the hospital,
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: I will explain the condition of the patient, and I will continue to guide
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: you so that your family can prepare for it.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: Then, in many cases,
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: the patient and the family take the situation well, and the patient also receives
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: a comfortable dose at the place where he is present.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: Of course, at first, he said he would get a dose at home without
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: going to the hospital,
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: and when the patient gets sick, his heart changes and he sometimes moves to the hospital.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: As I explained in the POLST, the POLST can be changed at any time
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: depending on the patient and family situation.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: In that case, we will provide you with hospice service, and we will respect
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: your choice and respect your family.

entries.text: However, as I said before, some life extension measures can give more pain to the patient,

entries.text: I would like to share my experience as a nurse.

entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.
